hero.tagline: Introducing Uzbek stars to the world

about.title: About
about.p1: #GASHTAK is a podcast featuring deep and candid conversations with Uzbekistan's most renowned personalities. In every episode, we discover our guests' life journeys, secrets of success, and their human side.
about.p2: Our goal is not just an interview, but inspiring and authentic conversations. Every episode is a new story, a new perspective on the world.
about.p3: The podcast is released regularly on YouTube and is also available in audio format on Spotify and other platforms. Follow us and watch new episodes first.

episodes.title: Podcasts
episodes.archiveSubtitle: All episodes of the GASHTAK podcast. Click on any to watch.

guests.title: Guests
guests.subtitle: Meet the famous guests of our podcast.

bios.hasanxon-domla: A prominent religious scholar and lecturer from Uzbekistan. Teaches millions of listeners about knowledge and life.
bios.jamshidxon-ziyoxonov: Uzbek actor known for his brilliant roles in theater and cinema. Brings a unique soul to every character.
bios.azimjon-pulatov: Content creator and blogger with a large audience on social media. A popular personality among youth.
bios.anvar-narzullayev: One of Uzbekistan's most beloved comedians. Makes millions of viewers laugh on stage and on screen.
